infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: HomeHeros needs your location to show you nearby service providers and track your Hero on booking day.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: HomeHeros needs your location to track your Hero on booking day.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: HomeHeros needs camera access to allow you to take photos for your bookings.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: HomeHeros needs photo library access to allow you to upload photos for your bookings.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: HomeHeros needs your location to track your Hero on booking day.

plugins.photosPermission: HomeHeros needs access to your photos to allow you to upload photos for your bookings.
